subcodes.first_line: O thou who art the sweet solace of every possessor of wisdom! Know thou verily that for every poison there is an antidote, and for every sting there is a balm. Indeed, know thou that this poison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نوش دل هر هوشمند هر زهریرا پادزهریست و هر نیشی را نوشی براستی بدان زهر
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @Manifestation of God as divine physician
